expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task statuses for pending, in progress, and done work.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Adding task status schema",
      "description": "As a product team, I want task records to store status so that tasks can track progress.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task records store a status value with default pending.",
        "Existing tasks resolve to pending after the migration or backfill.",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/tasks/schema.ts",
        "src/tasks/migrations/*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Updating task status from backend",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change a task status so that progress updates persist.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Status updates save pending, in progress, and done values.",
        "Invalid status values are rejected.",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/tasks/actions.ts",
        "src/tasks/service.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Showing task status badges",
      "description": "As a user, I want each task card to show its status so that progress is visible at a glance.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each task card renders the current status as a badge.",
        "Badge text matches the stored task status.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/tasks/components/TaskCard.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Changing task status from task list",
      "description": "As a user, I want status controls on the task list so that I can update work without opening details.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each task row exposes a status control.",
        "Selecting a new status saves through the backend update action.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/tasks/components/TaskList.tsx",
        "src/tasks/components/TaskStatusControl.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Filtering tasks by status",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can focus on one stage of work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "The task list can filter by pending, in progress, and done.",
        "Filter state updates the visible list contents.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/tasks/components/TaskList.tsx",
        "src/tasks/components/TaskStatusFilter.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover schema, backend status updates, badge display, status controls, and filtering.
